3. **TD** ($155.72→$154.84, -$0.88) — **HOLD.** Canadian bank at 11x P/E with 5% yield. Down 0.6% on a mixed day. Steepening curve narrative intact. No reason to cut.

4. **EFA** ($144.76→$144.58, -$0.18) — **HOLD.** Negligible move (-0.1%). International developed at 13x P/E — 35% discount to S&P 500. Weak CAD provides FX tailwind. Low risk hold.

5. **IBIT** ($58.74→$58.58, -$0.27% on 3 shares) — **HOLD.** Entered midday today on oversold RSI 29.6 mean reversion thesis. 3 shares at 8.8% of account. Too early to judge — mean reversion needs 1-2 days to play out.

### WATCH — Potential Exit Tomorrow

6. **ON** ($174.88→$172.35, -$2.53, -1.45%) — **HOLD with tight watch.** ON was up ~9% the prior day; today's -1.4% pullback is normal profit-taking. Momentum thesis intact but if it drops below $170, cut the position. It's 8.6% of account — near the per-position limit.
